summary: Comprehensive frontend testing of layout refinements (iteration 3). All 8 test requirements passed: Hero section with 65vh height and tighter spacing, About section with Core Capabilities in left column (not separate section), Study Abroad label visible, Sports Marketing video order correct (Football → Basketball → Baseball), Nike project sections in correct order (Overview → Key Contributions → Deliverables → Supporting Work), all 7 project cards visible and navigable, navigation links and Resume download working.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All layout refinements verified. Hero: min-h-[65vh], pt-12, tighter gaps. About section: Core Capabilities in left column under about text (2-column grid with 8 items), NOT as separate section below. Right column: Professional Background (3 entries), Education with Study Abroad Program text, Honors. Sports Marketing videos: Football first, Basketball second, Baseball third. Nike project: Overview → Key Contributions → Deliverables (clickable PDF) → Supporting Work (plain text bullets). All 7 projects navigable.
